site.name: Zaylore Studio
site.title: Zaylore Studio — Premium Clothing Brand, T-Shirts & Hoodies
site.description: Shop Zaylore Studio - premium clothing brand offering exclusive t-shirts, hoodies, streetwear, and fashion apparel. Trendy designer clothing for men and women.

home.title: Zaylore Studio — Premium Clothing Brand, T-Shirts & Hoodies | Buy Designer Apparel
home.description: Shop Zaylore Studio - premium clothing brand offering exclusive t-shirts, hoodies, streetwear, and fashion apparel. Trendy designer clothing for men and women. Built Different. Made to Lead.

about.title: About Zaylore Studio — Premium Clothing Brand, T-Shirts & Hoodies | Our Story
about.description: Learn about Zaylore Studio - a premium clothing brand specializing in t-shirts, hoodies, streetwear, and designer apparel. Discover our story, vision, and commitment to quality fashion for creators and culture enthusiasts.

collections_tshirts.title: Premium T-Shirts | Zaylore Studio - Designer Tees & Graphic T-Shirts
collections_tshirts.description: Explore Zaylore Studio's exclusive collection of premium t-shirts, graphic tees, and designer casual wear. High-quality apparel for men and women.

collections_hoodies.title: Hoodies & Sweatshirts | Zaylore Studio - Premium Apparel
collections_hoodies.description: Shop Zaylore Studio's premium hoodies and sweatshirts. Comfortable, stylish apparel for casual wear, streetwear, and everyday fashion.

collections_apparel.title: Premium Apparel | Zaylore Studio - Clothing Brand
collections_apparel.description: Browse Zaylore Studio's complete collection of premium apparel including t-shirts, hoodies, jackets, and streetwear fashion.

gallery.title: Gallery | Zaylore Studio - Product Showcase
gallery.description: View Zaylore Studio's product gallery featuring our latest collections of t-shirts, hoodies, and fashion apparel.

events.title: Events | Zaylore Studio - Fashion & Pop-Up Events
events.description: Stay updated on Zaylore Studio's upcoming fashion events, pop-up stores, and exclusive releases.

creators.title: Creators | Zaylore Studio - Collaborate with Us
creators.description: Join Zaylore Studio's creator community. Collaborate with our premium clothing brand and showcase your style.

contact.title: Contact Zaylore Studio — Premium T-Shirt & Hoodie Brand | Partnerships & Orders
contact.description: Contact Zaylore Studio for bulk orders, collaborations, partnerships, and inquiries about our premium clothing brand. Order custom t-shirts, hoodies, and streetwear apparel.

seo_recommendations.heading_hierarchy: Use H1 for page title, H2 for main sections, H3 for subsections
seo_recommendations.image_alt_text: Include relevant keywords in alt text (e.g., 'Zaylore Studio premium t-shirt - red graphic tee')
seo_recommendations.internal_linking: Link to related collections and products throughout content
seo_recommendations.schema_markup: Use Organization, Product, and LocalBusiness schemas
